fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the resource is a person or a machine.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the resource.

fields.name: Search Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies an alternate name that you can use to search for the record in question when you cannot remember the value in the Name field.

fields.name: Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies information in addition to the description.

fields.name: Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address of the resouce.

fields.name: Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional address information.

fields.name: City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the resouce.

fields.name: Social Security No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the person's social security number or the machine's serial number.

fields.name: Job Title
fields.tooltip: Specifies the person's job title.

fields.name: Education
fields.tooltip: Specifies the training, education, or certification level of the person.

fields.name: Contract Class
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contract class for the person.

fields.name: Employment Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the person began working for you or the date when the machine was placed in service.

fields.name: Resource Group No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the resource group that this resource is assigned to.

fields.name: Global Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a dimension value code that the resource is linked to. To see the dimension value codes you have set up for this dimension in the Dimension Values window, choose the field.
If you enter a dimension value code in this field, the corresponding dimension value is used as a default each time you enter the account on an entry line. Default dimension values are only suggestions and you can change them on the entry line, for example in a journal.

fields.name: Global Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a dimension value code that the resource is linked to. To see the dimension value codes you have set up for this dimension in the Dimension Values window, choose the field.
If you enter a dimension value code in this field, the corresponding dimension value is used as a default each time you enter the account on an entry line. Default dimension values are only suggestions and you can change them on the entry line, for example, in a journal.

fields.name: Base Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Specifies the base unit used to measure the resource, such as hour, piece, or kilometer. The base unit of measure also serves as the conversion basis for alternate units of measure.

fields.name: Direct Unit Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of one unit of the selected item or resource.

fields.name: Indirect Cost %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage of the item's last purchase cost that includes indirect costs, such as freight that is associated with the purchase of the item.

fields.name: Unit Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of one unit of the item or resource on the line.

fields.name: Profit %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the profit margin that you want to sell the resource at. You can enter a profit percentage manually or have it entered according to the Price/Profit Calculation field

fields.name: Price/Profit Calculation
fields.tooltip: Specifies the relationship between the Unit Cost, Unit Price, and Profit Percentage fields associated with this resource.

fields.name: Unit Price
fields.tooltip: Specifies the price of one unit of the item or resource. You can enter a price manually or have it entered according to the Price/Profit Calculation field on the related card.

fields.name: Vendor No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the vendor number of the vendor that is associated with this resource. To see the vendor numbers in the Vendor table, choose the field.
Enter this information if you plan to sort purchase reports by vendor.

fields.name: Last Date Modified
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date of the most recent change of information in the Resource Card window.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip:
Specifies if there are comments associated with this resource.
You can use the comments feature to leave notes to yourself or to document unusual events.
To see a comment, or to create a new one, on the Navigate tab, in the Resource group, choose Comments. The Comment Sheet window opens, in which you can see the existing comments and create new ones. See also the Comment Line table.
You can also enter a comment in the Notes FactBox.

fields.name: Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the related record is blocked from being posted in transactions, for example a customer that is declared insolvent or an item that is placed in quarantine.

fields.name: Date Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date interval that values are filtered by.
If this field contains starting and ending dates for a date interval, then other field values only show information for that interval.
The following table shows the rules for entering a date interval.


Meaning


Sample expression


Included entries


Equal to

12 15 12

Only entries that are posted on December 15, 2012.


Interval

12 15 12..01 15 13
..12 15 12

Entries that are posted on dates between and including December 15, 2012, and January 15, 2013.
Entries that are posted on January 15, 2012, or earlier.


Either/or

12 15 12|12 16 12

Entries that are posted on either December 15, 2012, or December 16, 2012. If there are entries that are posted on both days, then all entries are displayed.


The following table shows that you can also combine the various format types.


Sample expression


Included entries


12 15 12|12 01 12..12 10 12

Entries that are posted either on December 15, 2012, or on dates between and including December 1, 2012, and December 10, 2012.


..12 14 12|12 30 12..

Entries that are posted on December 14, 2012, or earlier, or entries that are posted on December 30, 2012, or later, which includes all entries except those that are posted on dates between and including December 15, 2012, and December 29, 2012.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the filter that filters by a measuring unit.
If the field contains a unit of measure filter, the amounts in the following fields are filtered according to the relevant unit of measure:
Unit Price

Vendor No.

Comment

fields.name: Capacity
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the total capacity of the resource that is available.
You can set a filter to see the capacity by date, unit of measure, and/or chargeable transactions.
You can enter figures that represent the resource's capacity in the Resource Capacity window.

fields.name: Qty. on Order (Job)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies how much of the capacity of the resource is assigned to jobs with the status Order.
You can set a filter to see the capacity by date, unit of measure, or chargeable transactions.

fields.name: Qty. Quoted (Job)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies how much of the capacity of the resource is assigned to jobs with the status Quote.
You can set a filter to see the capacity by date, unit of measure, or chargeable transactions.

fields.name: Usage (Qty.)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies how much of the resources have been used (based on quantity). Usage for resources can be recorded in the Resource Journal by selecting Usage for the Entry Type field or in the job journal. All entries in the job journal are recorded as usage.
You can set a filter to see the capacity by date, unit of measure, or chargeable resource transactions.

fields.name: Usage (Cost)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies how much of the resources have been used, based on cost. Usage for resources can be recorded in the Resource Journal by selecting Usage for the Entry Type field or in the job journal. All entries in the job journal are recorded as usage.
You can set a filter to see the capacity by date, unit of measure, or chargeable resource transactions.

fields.name: Usage (Price)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies how much of the resources have been used based on price. Usage for resources can be recorded in the Resource Journal by selecting Usage for the Entry Type field or in the job journal. All entries in the job journal are recorded as usage.
You can set a filter to see the capacity by date, unit of measure, and chargeable resource transactions.

fields.name: Sales (Qty.)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies how much capacity of the resource has been sold based on quantity. Sales for resources can be recorded in the Resource Journal by selecting Sale for the Entry Type field or in a sales invoice. All entries in the sales invoice are recorded as sales.
You can set a filter to see the capacity by date, unit of measure, or chargeable resource transactions.

fields.name: Sales (Cost)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies how much capacity of the resource has been sold based on cost. Sales for resources can be recorded in the Resource Journal by selecting Sale for the Entry Type field, or in a sales invoice. All entries in the sales invoice are recorded as sales.
You can set a filter to see the capacity by date, unit of measure, and chargeable resource transactions.

fields.name: Sales (Price)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies how much capacity of the resources has been sold based on prices. Sales for resources can be recorded in the Resource Journal by selecting Sale for the Entry Type field or in a sales invoice. All entries in the sales invoice are recorded as sales.
You can set a filter to see the capacity by date, unit of measure, and chargeable resource transactions.

fields.name: Chargeable Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies that the amounts in this table are divided into chargeable and non-chargeable transactions. You can use this field with the Usage fields.
Select this check box to see only the chargeable usage or chargeable sales for a resource group. Clear the check box to see only the non-chargeable usage or nonchargeable sales for a resource group. Leave the box blank to see both chargeable and nonchargeable usage or nonchargeable sales for a resource group.

fields.name: Gen. Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item's product type to link transactions made for this item with the appropriate general ledger account according to the general posting setup.

fields.name: Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code.

fields.name: County
fields.tooltip: Specifies a special region, to which the resource belongs.

fields.name: Automatic Ext. Texts
fields.tooltip: Specifies that an Extended Text Header will be added on sales or purchase documents for this resource.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the number series that was used to assign the resource's number.

fields.name: Tax Group Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the sales tax group code to which this resource belongs.
The tax group code is used in combination with the tax area code on the sales line to determine the sales tax percentage and the general ledger accounts for sales tax posting.
To see the available tax groups, choose the field.

fields.name: VAT Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT specification of the involved item or resource to link transactions made for this record with the appropriate general ledger account according to the VAT posting setup.

fields.name: Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region of the address.

fields.name: IC Partner Purch. G/L Acc. No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the intercompany g/l account number in your partner's company that the amount for this resource is posted to.

fields.name: Image
fields.tooltip: Specifies the picture that has been inserted for the resource.

fields.name: Privacy Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to limit access to data for the data subject during daily operations. This is useful, for example, when protecting data from changes while it is under privacy review.

fields.name: Coupled to Dataverse
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the resource is coupled to an entity in Dataverse.

fields.name: Qty. on Assembly Order
fields.tooltip:
Specifies how much of the capacity of the resource is assigned to assembly order lines.
You can set a filter to see the capacity by date, unit of measure, and chargeable transactions.

fields.name: Use Time Sheet
fields.tooltip: Specifies if a resource uses a time sheet to record time allocated to various tasks.

fields.name: Time Sheet Owner User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the owner of the time sheet.

fields.name: Time Sheet Approver User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the approver of the time sheet.

fields.name: Default Deferral Template Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the default template that governs how to defer revenues and expenses to the periods when they occurred.
